questions: Cosplay ki shudhu anime er jonno?
answers: Cosplay (costume play) is the art of dressing up as characters from anime, manga, video games, movies, or comics. It's a creative hobby that combines crafting, sewing, prop-making, and performance.

Cosplay shudhu anime er jonno na — people cosplay characters from Marvel, DC, Star Wars, video games, historical figures, ar original designs o. It's about creativity and celebrating characters you love.

To start cosplaying, pick a character you love, break down their costume into pieces, and start simple. Buy some items, craft others. Thrift stores, foam, fabric, and hot glue are a cosplayer's best friends!

Major cosplay events include Comic-Con (San Diego, New York), Anime Expo, Dragon Con, and Comiket (Japan). Cosplay can be budget-friendly with DIY skills or expensive for detailed builds — it's up to you!
